title: Waraqa
subtitle: Egyptian Sketchbook E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform for selling premium sketchbooks across Egypt. Built with Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Includes shopping cart, checkout with 4 payment methods (Cash on Delivery, InstaPay, Fawry, Vodafone Cash), user authentication, admin dashboard with analytics, and full Arabic/English support.

title: Clinic Digital Pitch Deck
subtitle: Professional Website Proposal for Egyptian Clinics
description: A persuasive, professionally designed pitch presentation targeting Egyptian clinic owners. Features a risk-free offer model (build first, pay only if satisfied), complete with statistics, service breakdown, and a clear 3-step process. Designed with a clean blue medical theme.
